title: Field Crop Breeding Phenomics Co-op
description: Collected, processed, and analyzed high-throughput phenotypic data from large-scale soybean, corn, and hybrid wheat trials using UAV, satellite imagery, NIR sensors, and digital imaging; built predictive models supporting early selection, line advancement, and product placement.

title: Ph.D. in Plant Science
description: Graduate Research Assistant in the Winter Wheat Breeding Program — developing deep learning (CNN & attention-based) and multi-trait genomic-selection models that fuse UAV phenomics, genomics, and environmental data to predict grain yield, protein content, and disease resistance.

title: Graduate Certificate in Data Science
description: Formal training in machine learning, statistics, and data engineering to complement quantitative-genetics research.

title: M.S. in Plant Breeding & Genetics
org: Punjab Agricultural University, Ludhiana, India · GPA 3.57/4
description: Molecular-genetic characterization of irradiated 'B' genome introgression lines of Brassica napus to identify genomic variation and assess introgression stability.

title: B.S. Agriculture (Hons.)
org: Lovely Professional University, Phagwara, India · GPA 3.99/4
description: Foundations in crop science, genetics, and statistics — graduated with distinction and four consecutive University Merit Awards.
